response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, including high-performance, distributed systems (e.g., at Dunnhumby). However, her resume lacks explicit mention of experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems, which are core to this role. Her recent work at re:cinq aligns closer with AI-agent infrastructure, but not directly with growth/experimentation systems. She demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and leadership but may need to bridge gaps in domain-specific experience.
strengths: Strong background in distributed, high-availability systems with micro-services experience
Proven technical leadership in architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, or growth systems
Limited mention of statistical methods or experimental analysis in resume
Lacks direct experience with enterprise-scale growth measurement or rollout automation
